case_title: COUNTY CREDIT CONTROL COMPANY vs. KAUN, DALLAS A.

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF COUNTY CREDIT CONTROL COMPANY SERVED FEB-26-1993, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT KAUN, DALLAS A.
CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF COUNTY CREDIT CONTROL COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT KAUN, DALLAS A. SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUN-04-1993
